title: sauvallella immarginata
intro: Sauvallella immarginata, also known as the "Sauvage" or "Wild Geranium", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Sauvallella immarginata include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sauvallella immarginata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
